heading: Powers and duties of Deputy Secretary of Agriculture
label: 2211 Powers and duties of Deputy Secretary of Agriculture
text: The Deputy Secretary of Agriculture is authorized to exercise the functions and perform the duties of the first assistant of the Secretary of Agriculture within the meaning of and shall perform such other duties as may be required by law or prescribed by the Secretary of Agriculture.section 3345 of title 5
notes: Codification“” substituted in text for “section 177 of the Revised Statutes of the United States (U.S.C., title 5, sec. 4)” on authority of , , , the first section of which enacted Title 5, Government Organization and Employees.Section 3345 of title 5Pub.
